ok I had to get on my laptop but we make it happen... and I do largely agree with Fib, you have one Ghelot team and that's kinda it, but that's not a bad thing

if the goal is to rush 350 (all the main rewards):
1. You can run a Ghelot team for an easy win, something like Ghelot/Thais/Aigis/Horla
2. In lower Alerts flexing Arachne as a DPS is a lot more viable than not, I think this is viable at least for the time being
3. you have a whale borrow so free wave

For the last two, you can abolutely go into the hanni to fix this:
4. Vortice banner, E0 Vortice, you get a free wave woohoo
5. Xu can enable Liz or Nymph to be a much more solid clear, so E0 Xu is a good target

Also consider dipping into the Ham/Murph/Clem banner and E1 Clem, E0 the other units, leftovers go to the wheels; Ham Wheel>Clem WHeel>Murphy Wheel

and you're set I think
